case_title: PROJECT COMMOTION VS. JAIME E. VALLE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROJECT COMMOTION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VALLE, JAIME E. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,050.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ISSUED, BAIL SET AT $500.00, WARRANT FORWARDED TO THE DEPARTMENT 506 AS TO DEFENDANT VALLE, JAIME E.
SIGNED AND SEALED COPY OF WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT FORWARDED TO SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT.
